steps.title: Set up equations and choose concrete values
steps.content:
From the percentages: $a = 22.23(b + c)$ (2,223% = 22.23) and $b = 0.78c$ (78% = 0.78).
To simplify arithmetic, let $c = 100$. Then:
  • $b = 0.78 \times 100 = 78$
  • $b + c = 178$
  • $a = 22.23 \times 178 = 3,956.94$

steps.title: Calculate the ratio as a percentage
steps.content:
Find what percent of $b$ is $a$:
$$\frac{a}{b} = \frac{3,956.94}{78} = 50.73$$
Converting to a percentage: $50.73 \times 100\% = 5,073\%$. That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
